title: Fragrant Mushroom
description: Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: The relic activates when obtained. It deals 15 unblockable, unpowered damage to the player and automatically upgrades 2 random upgradable cards from the player's deck. Only upgradable cards are eligible for selection.
